rows.snippet: class DDGS: """Dux Distributed Global Search. A metasearch library that aggregates results from diverse web search services. Args: proxy (str, optional): proxy for the HTTP client, supports http/https/socks5 protocols. example: "http://user:pass@example.com:3128". Defaults to None. timeout (int, optional): Timeout value for the HTTP client. Defaults to 5. verify: (bool | str): True to verify, False to skip, or a str path to a PEM file.
